channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Closes Above $420 for First Time, Retail Buying May Accelerate
item.description: Vanda data show five-day retail net buying averages rose from $87 million to $135 million above $420.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Fireworks Are Triumph Of American Innovation, But China Threat Looms
item.description: The U.S. innovation engine, from the Model T to SpaceX and AI, continues to be a rocket for America's economy. But China is a growing rival.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Sinks As Tech Leaders Sandisk, Tesla, TTM Tech Slump; Dow Climbs (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rises in mixed trade Thursday. Tesla stock skids despite strong Q2 deliveries.

item.title: Michael Burry's newest short reveals what really worries him about AI
item.description: The AI trade isn’t just about Nvidia anymore. That could be the true warning sign underlying Michael Burry’s current move on the markets. The investor behind "The Big Short" has revealed new bearish positions against Tesla (TSLA), Nvidia (NVDA), Caterpillar (CAT), Applied Materials (AMAT), and th...

item.title: Tesla Second-Quarter Deliveries Top Views; Shares Fall Intraday
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) shares were down Thursday even as the company's second-quarter deliveries beat Wall Str

item.title: Tesla global auto sales jump 25% in 2nd quarter, beating expectations
item.description: Tesla reported a jump in second-quarter auto sales Thursday, as Elon Musk's electric vehicle company easily topped expectations in a period of lofty gasoline prices due to the US-Iran war.Also Thursday, Ford reported 10 percent drop in US auto sales to 549,200, reflecting vehicle phaseouts, lower...

item.title: Tesla, Rivian, Strategy, Moderna, Sandisk, Blue Owl, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: FEATURE Stocks traded mixed Thursday following a jobs report that showed the U.S. labor market grew at a slower pace in June. Strategy advanced 6.3% as higher cryptocurrencies prices boosted the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin Robinhood Markets rose 4.

item.title: Why Patience Is The Real Catalyst For Tesla Stock
item.description: The electric vehicle maker's shares carry a premium price, but the real question is whether you believe in the growth that makes them cheaper down the road.

item.title: Tesla just told us twice that Model Y L is coming to the U.S.
item.description: Tesla just told us twice that the Model Y L is coming to the U.S., and two social media posts definitely just tipped the company’s hand, as if they wanted it to be any other way. The two social media posts basically confirm that the slightly longer version of the Model Y will be heading to the Un...

item.title: Tesla Sales Roared Back In Q2, After Months Of Downward Spiraling
item.description: The automaker saw a massive spike in second quarter sales despite rocky demand for EVs in the U.S.

item.title: Good News For Tesla Stock Investors
item.description: Tesla Scores Major Win as U.S. Closes Safety Probe Into 695,000 Vehicles

item.title: Tesla Sales Blow Away Expectations. Why the Stock Is Dropping.
item.description: FEATURE The stock market remains undefeated in frustrating investors. Tesla’s delivery results are the latest example. Tesla reported exceptional second-quarter delivery results on Thursday.

item.title: Top Midday Stories: June Jobs Report Comes in Well Below Expectations; Tesla Q2 Deliveries Jump 25% Year Over Year to 480,126 Vehicles
item.description: Wall Street's major market averages were mixed in late-morning trading Thursday, as investors reacte

item.title: Stock Market Rebounds, But AI Falters; Meta, Tesla, Jobs Report In Focus: Weekly Review
item.description: The key indexes had strong weekly gains, but AI stocks faltered amid Meta buzz. Tesla fell on a blowout deliveries report.

item.title: Elon Musk shuts down ‘4D chess’ theory on Tesla Optimus production
item.description: Elon Musk has directly rejected a popular fan theory that Tesla is secretly further ahead on Optimus than it lets on, warning instead that production of its humanoid robot “will be extremely slow at first.” The comment cuts against a bullish narrative that Tesla’s quiet stretch on Optimus is a st...

item.title: Tesla is using vehicle microphones to improve build quality: here’s how
item.description: Tesla is using the vehicles’ internal microphones to improve build quality, Vice President of Engineering Lars Moravy revealed recently. It’s no secret that Tesla is always finding ways to make its manufacturing operations more efficient, accurate, and valuable. Constantly trying to make its cars...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 deliveries jump 25% to 480,126, beating estimates
item.description: Tesla delivered 480,126 vehicles in the second quarter of 2026, up 25% from the same quarter a year ago and roughly 74,000 vehicles above Wall Street’s consensus estimate. It’s Tesla’s strongest second quarter ever and its first year-over-year delivery growth after two straight years of decline.

item.title: Tesla reports blowout Q2 deliveries of 480K, easily topping estimates
item.description: submitted by /u/THATS_LEGIT_BRO [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla crushes Wall Street expectations, beats delivery estimates by over 15 percent
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) beat Wall Street expectations of 406,000 vehicles delivered in Q2 by reporting 480,126 deliveries for the three months ending in June. Tesla reported it delivered 467,762 Model 3 and Model Y units, while 12,364 Model S, Model X, and Cybertrucks switched hands during the qu...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
item.description: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla Vehicles Cleared as US Regulator Closes Deceleration Probe
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has been cleared after the US National Highway Traffic Safety Administration closed its

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500, Dow Futures Subdued Ahead Of June Jobs Report: Why TSLA, MU, NBIS, NVDA, SMCI, IREN Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment around SPY and QQQ is ‘bullish.’

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips Overnight: Tesla Model Y L Rumors Heat Up After ‘Long Weekend’ Tease As Investors Await Q2 Deliveries
item.description: The Model Y L is a stretched six-seat Model Y with more rear-seat space, a longer wheelbase, and a 2+2+2 layout.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead; Meta Jumps On AI Move
item.description: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Meta Jumps But Hits SpaceX, Micron; Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
item.description: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.

item.title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.Most Read fro...

item.title: TSLA Stock Up for Fourth Straight Day Before Thursday Deliveries Report — Wall Street Expects Year-On-Year Growth
item.description: Gene Munster of Deepwater Asset Management forecasts Tesla will deliver 420,000 vehicles in the June quarter.

item.title: SpaceX Got a Buy Call From a Tesla Bull. Why the Stock Plummeted.
item.description: With shares of Elon Musk’s rocket and AI company volatile in post-IPO trading, investors will be paying close attention to what Wall Street has to say about valuation. The latest rating is a bullish call, valuing SpaceX at a cool $2.5 trillion. Tuesday evening, Wedbush analyst Dan Ives launched c...

item.title: Why this analyst thinks it's too soon to buy SpaceX
item.description: KeyBanc Capital Markets Senior Research Analyst, Aerospace & Defense, Michael Leshock, explains why he believes SpaceX (SPCX) is not a buy right now, adding that investors should wait to invest until some sizable milestones are met before diving into the stock.

item.title: Musk Meme Traders Rush Back Into Tesla When the Stock Hits $420
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Crossing $420 gets Tesla Inc. investors excited.Most Read from BloombergMeta Is Planning a Cloud Business to Sell AI Computing PowerSpaceX IPO Left Mirae With No Shares on MisunderstandingKrafton Agrees to Pay ‘Subnautica 2’ Bonuses as Developer’s CEO ResignsUS Decides Against Rene...

item.title: Tesla, GM And Ford Converge On The BESS Market. Here's What That Means.
item.description: Ford and GM jump into battery energy storage systems. But they must play catch up to Tesla, and to this worldwide BESS leader.

item.title: Tesla’s Margin Expansion vs. Rivian’s R2 Bet: Two Paths to EV Dominance, One Winner
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) both posted Q1 2026 results that beat Wall Street estimates, yet the businesses underneath are on opposite ends of the EV maturity curve. Tesla flexed margin expansion and AI ambition. Rivian leaned on partnerships and a fresh product launch to bridg...

item.title: Tesla Falls Ahead of Delivery Report
item.description: June registrations improved in several European markets, but Norway weakness kept investors cautious.

item.title: Tesla Semi involved in first fatal crash, killing 2 in Nevada
item.description: A Tesla Semi was involved in its first known fatal crash, killing two people on U.S. 50 in Nevada on Sunday morning. The driver of the Class 8 electric truck reportedly fell asleep before rear-ending two passenger vehicles stopped at a red light, according to preliminary statements from investiga...

item.title: Tesla Optimus project fires up as Musk sees production line progress
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk posted a photo of himself standing with the Optimus production team inside Tesla’s Fremont factory, arms crossed amid workers in hard hats and safety vests. The image captures a pivotal industrial shift: the same facility space once dedicated to building Tesla’s flagship Model...

item.title: Gary Black Dismisses FSD Hype Behind Tesla’s Rally, Says Rising Oil Prices Have Boosted Q2 Delivery Expectations
item.description: Black said he expects Tesla to deliver about 410,000 vehicles in the second quarter, which would be a 7% increase from a year earlier.

item.title: YPF Sociedad Anónima (YPF) to Collaborate With Tesla on Energy Storage Infrastructure and Fast-Charging Networks
item.description: YPF Sociedad Anónima (NYSE:YPF) is one of the 10 integrated oil and gas companies to invest in according to hedge funds. On June 16, the Argentine national energy provider, YPF Sociedad Anónima (NYSE:YPF), announced that it signed an LOI with Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) to collaborate on energy stor...

item.title: Will Tesla (TSLA) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

item.title: Forget Tesla: Why Smart Money Is Ditching Tesla To Buy Apple Stock
item.description: Tesla is once again the ticker every headline is chasing, riding a 10.22% one-week rip on robotaxi buzz and Optimus promises. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) story requires you to pay 416x earnings for a company whose full-year 2025 revenue fell 2.93%, who...

item.title: Tesla gets its latest short from Michael Burry: ‘Happy it jumped back to this level’
item.description: Tesla short seller Michael Burry, the subject of the film “The Big Short,” where he was portrayed by Steve Carell, has revealed he has opened a new bet against the stock. In a new update to his Substack newsletter in a post titled “ Trading Post June 30, 2026, ” Burry revealed a new set of bets a...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rides a 10% Weekly Gain Into a High-Stakes Delivery Report
item.description: Numbers for Tesla’s second-quarter deliveries range from below 400,000 cars to almost 470,000. The divergence is wide.

item.title: China EV Sales: BYD's Soars Overseas, Leapmotor Has Best Month Of 2026
item.description: BYD continues its comeback, after a tough start to the year, according to new data. Other Tesla rivals like XPeng and Xiaomi also had a strong June.

item.title: BYD poised to retake global EV sales crown from Tesla (TSLA)
item.description: Chinese automaker widens lead in second-quarter electric vehicle deliveriesBYD Co. (USOTC:BYDDY) is on track to regain its position as the world’s largest seller of fully electric vehicles, with second-quarter deliveries expected to outpace those of Tesla Inc.

item.title: Wedbush Initiates SpaceX Coverage With 'Outperform' Rating, $190 Price Target
item.description: Analysts at Wedbush gave SpaceX an "outperform" rating with a price target of $190 a share. The stock rose 2% on Wednesday morning.

item.title: SpaceX’s AI Business Alone Is Worth $1.8 Trillion, Says This Analyst
item.description: With shares of Elon Musk’s rocket and AI company volatile in post-IPO trading, investors will be paying close attention to what Wall Street has to say about valuation. The latest rating is a bullish call, valuing SpaceX at a cool $2.5 trillion. Wedbush analyst Dan Ives launched coverage of SpaceX...

item.title: Cybertruck failure kills home charging, and Tesla is avoiding a recall
item.description: A growing number of Tesla Cybertruck owners are losing the ability to charge at home due to failures of the truck’s Power Conversion System (PCS), the unit that handles AC charging and steps the high-voltage pack down to the 48-volt system. Tesla is aware of the problem and is quietly replacing t...

item.title: SpaceX gets initial stock coverage from Tesla’s biggest bull
item.description: Wedbush Securities is initiating stock coverage on SpaceX ( NASDAQ: SPCX ), marking the first comments on the company since it went public several weeks ago. Wedbush and its analyst handling coverage, Dan Ives, are widely bullish on fellow Musk company Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ). Ives wrote his first...

item.title: BYD set to crush Tesla again in Q2 EV sales with 557,000 deliveries
item.description: BYD delivered 557,090 fully electric vehicles in the second quarter of 2026, according to figures compiled by Bloomberg, putting the Chinese automaker back on top of the global battery-electric race. Tesla is expected to report around 396,500 deliveries for the same quarter — a gap of more than 1...

item.title: Cathie Wood Doubles Down on AI, Loads Up on Tesla, Palantir, and SpaceX
item.description: Cathie Wood Loads Up on AI Winners, Cuts Roku and China Exposure

item.title: Tesla’s Chip Breakthrough Is a Big Deal. Time to Buy the Surge?
item.description: Shares of Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) have been picking up in recent sessions, now close to 13% in just three sessions. Undoubtedly, just because Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ:SPCX) is the new hot Elon Musk stock in town does not mean shares of the EV juggernaut are going to be stuck going sidew...
